title: Australian Apricot Pancakes
description: Fluffy pancakes filled with caramelized apricots, perfect for a sweet breakfast treat.
instructions: In a large bowl, whisk together flour, sugar, and salt.
In a separate bowl, whisk together milk, apricot jam, and eggs.
Pour the wet ingredients into the dry ingredients and stir until just combined.
Heat a non-stick pan or griddle over medium heat.
Drop the batter by 1/4 cupfuls onto the pan.
Cook for 2-3 minutes, until bubbles appear on the surface.
Flip and cook for an additional 1-2 minutes.
Meanwhile, caramelize the dried apricots in a pan with butter over medium heat.
Serve the pancakes with caramelized apricots and additional apricot jam if desired.
